title: ajuga chamaecistus subsp. euphrasioides
intro: Ajuga chamaecistus subsp. euphrasioides, also known as Ajuga euphrasioides, is a perennial plant species in the family Lamiaceae, native to the Balkan Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ajuga chamaecistus subsp. euphrasioides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and decoctions, have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
